premium.name: The Amaya Luxury Resort Goa
premium.description: Oceanfront luxury resort with private beach access, infinity pool, and world-class spa. Perfect for romantic getaways and wellness retreats.

premium.name: Taj Exotica Maldives
premium.description: Overwater villas with glass floors, private butler service, and marine life viewing. Ultimate luxury in the Indian Ocean.

premium.name: The Leela Palace Udaipur
premium.description: Palace hotel on Lake Pichola with royal suites, traditional Rajasthani architecture, and award-winning dining.

premium.name: Six Senses Fort Barwara
premium.description: 14th-century fort converted to luxury wellness resort. Ancient walls meet modern spa therapies.

premium.name: Aman-i-Khas Ranthambore
premium.description: Luxury tented camp on the edge of Ranthambore National Park. Tiger safaris and Mughal-inspired tents.

oyo.name: OYO Townhouse 145 Goa Calangute
oyo.description: Modern rooms with free Wi-Fi, AC, clean linen, and complimentary breakfast. Walking distance to Calangute Beach.

oyo.name: OYO Flagship 289 Mumbai Andheri
oyo.description: Business-friendly hotel near metro station. Free high-speed Wi-Fi, work desk, 24-hour front desk.

oyo.name: Capital O 1234 Delhi Connaught Place
oyo.description: Central location near Rajiv Chowk. Clean rooms, AC, free Wi-Fi, and attached bathroom with hot water.

oyo.name: Spot On 5678 Bangalore Koramangala
oyo.description: Budget stay in tech hub. Free Wi-Fi, AC, power backup, and close to restaurants and pubs.

oyo.name: SilverKey 9012 Jaipur City Center
oyo.description: Premium OYO category with enhanced amenities. Rooftop restaurant, heritage decor, free breakfast.

oyo.name: OYO Townhouse 334 Kochi Marine Drive
oyo.description: Sea-facing rooms with Marine Drive views. Free Wi-Fi, AC, and easy access to Fort Kochi.

oyo.name: Capital O 7788 Hyderabad Hitech City
oyo.description: Near IT corridor. Clean rooms, free Wi-Fi, AC, and 24-hour check-in for late flights.

oyo.name: OYO Flagship 4455 Chennai Marina Beach
oyo.description: Beachside location with Marina views. Free breakfast, Wi-Fi, AC, and travel desk.

global.name: Marriott Resort Goa
global.description: 5-star resort with multiple pools, kids club, golf course, and 6 dining options. Family-friendly luxury.

global.name: Hilton Shillim Estate
global.description: Wellness retreat in Sahyadri mountains. Spa, yoga, organic farm, and conservation programs.

global.name: Hyatt Regency Delhi
global.description: Luxury hotel near diplomatic enclave. Club lounge, multiple restaurants, and extensive meeting facilities.

global.name: InterContinental Maldives
global.description: Lagoon-facing overwater villas. Marine biologist, kids club, and 6 restaurants including underwater dining.

global.name: ITC Grand Chola Chennai
global.description: Luxury hotel with Chola dynasty architecture. Award-winning restaurants, spa, and vast convention center.

global.name: JW Marriott Mumbai Sahar
global.description: Airport-adjacent luxury with rooftop pool, 5 restaurants, and quick terminal access. Ideal for transit.
